reviews.text:
We got married here in May of 2025, and I could not recommend this venue enough!
This will likely be a long review, but if you are engaged and looking for a wedding venue, it is worth the read. Scribner Bend was the best option we could have chosen for our wedding, and I am so glad we did.
Tldr: This venue works to save you money, has an attentive and detail oriented staff, and offers a lot to justify the price!
The biggest standout was how committed the staff and team are to making sure you get the best value from your wedding.
- They cut fees without us asking (there was initially an outside vendor % fee that they changed to a flat price, or that %, whichever was lower)
- They worked with us to get what we wanted out of our wedding without additional costs (letting us substitute a red wine for sangria and a white wine for the sparkling almond without an upcharge, letting us know how to get a vegetarian option for our guests without having to pay for an additional main course, allowing us to bring in things that the venue doesn't provide at no extra cost, etc.)
- they allowed us to make changes to our headcount before making the final payment. The wedding industry is FULL of people who know they can throw in extra fees without repercussion, and Scribner bend is not like that at all.
- They honored the venue and catering price we signed under, even though we got married almost 2 years after signing. They did this without us asking.
- The venue also processed and sent the refund of our deposit by the time we got back from our honeymoon.
Additionally, the staff and service overall was amazing. They remembered us by face every time we went into the tasting room, they were reachable with questions and had a wonderful response time(and I had a LOT of questions since I did not have a planner), and it was clear that they wanted to make the wedding process easy for us. Our wedding coordinator was extremely knowledgeable on everything (from venue details to the best time to call an uber back home), and she coordinated so well with Rain from Paesanos. She actually ran our wedding rehearsal better than full service planners i've seen at other weddings. The team offered well-planned options for day-of logistics, but were 100% on board with our updated vision for the day, and made it come to life at no extra cost.
Scribner bend is also an easy venue to get married at. The grounds are naturally beautiful, so the only florals we bought were my bouquet to hold, and flowers for our tables. This saved us THOUSANDS of dollars. The venue is private (and the tasting rooms are closed by the time of the wedding) so you never run the risk of wedding crashers. The getting ready bungalow was HUGE. We were able to do florals and candles, have two make up artists, AND have private places to relax and get dressed without being overcrowded (and I had a huge wedding party). My husband loved the air stream as well, but I still still think the bungalow was better :). They had a good relationship with Celebrations party rentals, where my husband and I were able to customize our rentals, but still get them through Scribner Bend at a slightly lower cost (fewer fees!). I thought we were going to feel like the 11pm stop time was too early, but it actually made sure the party went until the very end, and allowed us time to say goodbye to our loved ones without feeling like we were missing any part of the evening. I would recommend Scribner bend 100 times over!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Alyssa.....thank you so so much for this wonderful and thoughtful review. We cannot begin to tell you how much we loved watching you and Keeler thoroughly enjoy your special day and we are so grateful you chose Scribner Bend for your venue. It was an absolutely gorgeous wedding and you and Keeler are the best!!!!!
Please come visit us soon!
The entire Wedding Team!

reviews.text: Hillary and the staff at Scribner Bend were a joy to work with on my clients wedding. They were attentive to details, worked with me and the couple to bring their vision to life and made sure the guest experience was top notch. I highly recommend this venue to anyone for their weddings and events!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you so much for the review Allie. Love this coming from a planner who really sees what is happening behind the scenes.
We absolutely love what you did with Adrienne and Zachary's wedding which was a complete dream and hope to see you back for another SBV wedding soon!!!

reviews.text:
We held our wedding at Elliston Vineyards in June 2025. The venue is beautiful and well-maintained. There’s a timeless charm to the historic mansion, the vineyard, and the mountain views that made our day feel truly magical.

On wedding day, we had full access to the mansion on site - my wife and her bridesmaids got ready in the bridal suite, while I hung out with my groomsmen on the first floor, playing pool and gathering in the library.

The courtyard where we held our ceremony was stunning, with the vineyard on one side and mountains in the distance. The deck for the reception was equally beautiful.

The staff we interacted with were all attentive, respectful, and efficient. They made sure the entire day ran smoothly, and we felt so taken care of.

We also had the pleasure of working with Weddings with Athena, our wedding planner and coordinator, who we met through Elliston. She was key in making our day run smoothly.

Elliston Vineyards will always hold a special place in our hearts. We’re so grateful we got to celebrate our wedding there.

title: Casa Real at Ruby Hill Winery

reviews.text:
I just attended a wedding here and wow, I was so impressed. I’ve been to quite a few weddings and have to say this venue is top notch. It feels so luxurious and very Europe-esque.

From inside to out, everything is so well maintained. The space is spotless, and the landscaping and plants are clearly cared for with attention to detail. The food was also one of my absolute favorites — they served short ribs and mac, a flambe donut station, a late-night fry station, and more.

I would love to come back and attend another wedding here. Absolutely breathtaking venue!

We had our dream wedding at Casa Real! Our day-of coordinators, Heather and Kelsea, were incredible—they kept us on schedule, paid close attention to every request and detail, and thoughtfully included drinks and appetizers in our bridal suite, which was so comfortable and perfect for resting between events.

During the early planning process, Carly also offered delicious suggestions for our signature drinks, and our guests loved the hors d’oeuvres and dinner. Many friends were so impressed that their families are already recommending the venue for future weddings.

The Sun Garden was dreamy and magical, with delicate trees and the peaceful sound of the fountain as I walked down the aisle. I also loved the uplighting in the Grand Salon reception room (we customized the color to light pink and it added such an elegant touch)! The team made our slightly smaller guest count of around 90 feel perfectly accommodated. The only minor disappointment was that cold sparks and fog machines aren’t allowed, but it didn’t take away from the beauty of the day.

Beautiful venue for a wedding -- lots of great photo spots! We've photographed two Indian weddings at Nella Terra and both of our couples were really happy with their experiences here. They updated their getting ready spaces recently and they put a lot of care into the landscaping. Nella Terra Cellars feels like it's own little oasis in the hills.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you Jamie and Lauren! It's always a pleasure having you here. We love seeing how you capture the beauty of the couple's love story and the setting.

reviews.text: We have been to Nella Terra Cellars for 2 weddings and what a beautiful place to get married. If you are looking for a winery wedding venue, we highly recommend touring Nella Terra, you will be amazed at this place. - What’s Up Photos, photo booth

title: Cielo Farms Vineyard | Wedding & Event Venue

reviews.text:
I wanted to share some feedback regarding our recent visit to your winery, which we booked as part of a birthday celebration.

Unfortunately, our experience was disappointing due to circumstances that we were unaware of when booking. We paid full price for the visit but were unable to walk around or enjoy the full experience of the winery because a wedding was taking place on the property. It would have been helpful to be informed about this restriction in advance so we could have adjusted our plans accordingly.

Additionally, the staff interactions toward the end of our visit were discouraging. While we were waiting for our Uber, we were asked to leave the property rather abruptly, and some staff members came across as quite rude. We were also surprised that no one offered us the opportunity to taste or purchase any bottles of wine, which we had been looking forward to as part of the experience.

We truly appreciate the beauty of your venue and understand that events like weddings can impact operations, but we hope you’ll take this feedback into consideration for future guests. We would also appreciate clarification on your policy in situations like this, as we did not receive the full value of what we paid for.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback regarding your recent birthday celebration with us. We are very sorry to hear that your experience was disappointing and did not meet your expectations.

Upon reviewing your booking, we can confirm that you purchased tickets for the "Guided Tasting and Picnic at the Terrace," which is an experience hosted in a specific location on our property.

We understand your frustration regarding the wedding that was taking place simultaneously. All information regarding access to the grounds and the possibility of concurrent private events is provided within the terms and conditions of the ticket purchase, which must be agreed to before completing the transaction. Your ticket granted you access to the terrace for your guided experience, but not the entirety of the estate, which was privately reserved for the wedding party.

We will be addressing this feedback directly with our team to ensure our service improves.

We appreciate you bringing this to our attention.

title: Sacred Oak Vineyard
address: 8305 Oak Glen Rd, Cherry Valley, CA 92223

reviews.text:
My husband and I got married at Callaway and it was the best decision ever. One day, we simply strolled in and asked about weddings there because of the breathtaking views from the top of the hill- that sunset was priceless. We spoke with Tanya, who immediately made us feel welcome and confident. We worked with Mariah, a young, patient, kind, and generous person who guided me through the planning experience without ever adding stress.
The day of was a fairytale and the most magical experience that we never imagined was possible, but Callaway made it all worth it. Although we had some problems with the winery across the street making too much noice during my ceremony, the level of professionalism and hospitality the staff showed me prevented me- a stressed out bride- from going crazy. The staff were young, but they were incredible. I wish I caught everyone’s names but Rihana, the girl who drove me up to the ceremony spot on the golf cart was the sweetest and most patient person ever, who reassured me and listened without needing to and did so without hesitation. Dalton provided amazing bar tending service and took very good care of the set up and take down staff.
The barrel room venue was stunning. It WOWed our guests and made our wedding iconic. Everyone told us about how unexpectedly stunning  their experience was. I can’t recommend this place and people enough. I am not exaggerating at all- that’s how wonderful Callaway and their staff are!
This was the best way to start our married life.

reviews.text:
Kings River winery is an amazing venue for all types of events, from birthday parties to weddings and even small get togethers or just a weekend wine tasting. We had our wedding here and the day was absolutely amazing. Ashley and her team are specialized at making sure everything goes off without a hitch and they are very accommodating to requests we had. The team was professional and easy to get ahold of through planning and happy to talk us through the smallest questions we had. They always returned phone calls in a timely manner and were always on time for meetings.
We have been going to KRW for wine tasting for a few years and attended a few weddings there before deciding on it for our venue and are very happy we did. Would recommend KRW venues to anyone for any type of event or even just to hang out on a Sunday afternoon for a tasting.

reviews.text:
Gosh, Monserate!!! What a place!! Truly perfect in every way. From day one, Stephanie was incredible - so kind, professional, and attentive. She made us feel completely taken care of and made the planning process feel so smooth.
We got married at Villa de Fiore, and let me tell you, this venue is absolutely STUNNING. From the bridal suite to the ballroom, the bar, the bathrooms, and every single detail - everything was flawless. The staff, the food, and the overall vibes were top notch.
I wish I could attend more weddings here just to enjoy the beauty of the space again! We’re already planning to come back for our anniversary because it’s such a special place. If you’re looking for a wedding venue, this is your sign to tour Monserate. You will not regret it!

Monserate Weddings was absolutely perfect for our special day! We had canceled our previous venue and were feeling stressed, but when we visited Monserate, everything just clicked. They were able to get us a new date quickly and worked with us within such a short timeframe, making the entire process so smooth and easy. The property is absolutely stunning, and it’s clear they truly know what they’re doing as a venue.

We chose Villa de Fiore, and it was everything we dreamed of and more. The suites for both the bride and groom were beautiful and comfortable, the food was wonderful (the group tasting was such a fun experience—we loved meeting other couples), and the grounds made for the most breathtaking backdrop. It was truly our dream venue, and we wouldn’t have had it any other way.

Carissa, our venue coordinator, was an absolute gem to work with. She was so sweet, flexible, and understanding of our situation, and she went above and beyond to make sure everything was seamless. She was detail-oriented, responsive, and made sure our wedding day went off without a hitch. We’re so grateful for her support and kindness.

Thank you, Carissa, and thank you Monserate Weddings, for making our dream wedding come true!

As a florist who has worked on over 100 weddings, I’ve seen a lot of venues, but Monserate Winery completely stole my heart. The very first time I did a wedding here, I remember thinking, “If I ever have a wedding, it has to be here.” And funny enough… that’s exactly what happened!

We weren’t even planning to have a wedding celebration originally, but after working an event at Monserate and seeing how stunning, peaceful, and thoughtfully run everything was, we changed our minds. We fell in love with the space so quickly that we booked it within the same week.

The views are breathtaking, the vineyard, the trees, the sunset light, everything feels like a dream. But what really sealed the deal was the team. The staff were so warm, helpful, and genuinely kind. They made us and our guests feel so well taken care of from start to finish.

And the food? Absolutely amazing. Every dish was fresh, flavorful, and beautifully presented. Our guests couldn’t stop raving about it, several even told us it was the best wedding meal they’ve ever had!

As someone who works in weddings for a living, I can confidently say Monserate Winery is a gem. It’s not just a gorgeous venue, it’s a place run by people who truly care. We’re so thankful we found it, and we’ll cherish the memories made there forever.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much for this heartfelt and thoughtful review Zoey—it means the world coming from someone with your experience in the wedding industry. We're honored that Monserate Winery not only captured your professional eye but also became the place for your own celebration. It brings us so much joy to know that our team, setting, and food left such a lasting impression on you and your guests. Thank you for trusting us with such a special moment—we’ll treasure being part of your story.

reviews.text:
As a wedding photographer, I’ve had the privilege of capturing love stories at some stunning venues, but Allegretto Vineyard Resort is truly something special. The Tuscan-inspired architecture, lush vineyards, and beautifully manicured grounds create a dreamy, romantic setting that feels like a destination wedding without ever leaving California.

The venue offers endless opportunities for breathtaking photos—golden hour in the vineyards, intimate moments by the stone arches, and even dramatic captures in the serene courtyard. Every corner is thoughtfully designed and perfect for capturing timeless, elegant memories.

The staff is also fantastic to work with—professional, accommodating, and truly invested in making every couple’s day seamless and magical. Their attention to detail ensures that the day flows smoothly, which is a dream not only for couples but for vendors like myself!

If you’re looking for a venue that blends elegance, romance, and an unparalleled aesthetic, Allegretto Vineyard Resort is an incredible choice. I can’t wait to return for future weddings!

title: Rosenthal - The Malibu Estate Vineyard
address: Kanan Dume Rd &, W Newton Canyon Rd, Malibu, CA 90265

reviews.text: Amazing wedding venue!! I'm the co-founder of Tangerine Weddings and we've shot at Domenico Winery for photography and videography and love it every time! Bruna and Pia are especially organized and incredible at what they do. Every wedding we've done there has been smooth sailing and stunning! We love how versatile and custom their space is so you can create any type of vibe for your wedding. Would highly recommend their space to host your upcoming wedding or event!

title: Riverbench Vineyard & Winery
address: 6020 Foxen Canyon Rd, Santa Maria, CA 93454

reviews.text:
Hidden Gem Winery!

Hidden: Tucked away in the Vineyard surrounded by open fields and subdivisions is the wonderful winery and event center. I would have never thought there would be a winery out here but it when you are here it is very easy to forget where you are. Rolling fields and not civilization in site that you could believe you are in the foothills or Napa. It has a large sprawling estate.

Service: We were the first to arrive quite a bit early for our reservation but our house was personable and super friendly. She was knowledgeable about the wines and very open to us trying out various different wines

Wine/Food: I did not get a chance to try any of the food but they did have some charcuterie boards available in a fridge. The wine was varied and separated by reds, whites and sparkling. I was genuinely surprised by the almond wine as normally sparking is not my favorite.

Other: This place is known for its weddings and it really has the acerage and feel for it. Various fountains, picturesque spots and lots of space for a great wedding venue.

Awesome place for wine tasting or a wedding!

Awesome venue for a wedding! My daughter just got married there this weekend and the place is magical! There are fountains, palm trees, rose lined pathways, beautiful lighting around all the trees at night, vineyards, weeping willow, bridges, outdoor wine tasting areas, open lawn areas, a unity circle area for the ceremony, a huge beautiful house modern and tastefully decorated to use day of for getting ready, and outdoor area for dancing. It’s like getting transported to another world of its own. Like being in Napa or LA. All the facilities are modern and updated. All our guests loved it and it was just dreamlike.. So glad we decided on Wolfe  heights. Also if you need a wedding planner Perfect Plan weddings and Paige were awesome. And Amore florist decorated the place so beautifully. Toningocustomcakes on Instagram for our cake ! We will have fond memories of this place… truly magical

We got married here in October 2025 and we absolutely loved the venue. This location is for sure a hidden gem in South Sacramento and we got nothing but compliments from our guests. We loved how the venue would have Open Houses to really showcase their preferred vendors; we went to almost every Open House leading up to our wedding date and were able to see vendors in action and select some really great people to help make our day so special. The wine was delicious and staff were very friendly. Our only issue was communication with the event manager. We booked with them before they switched management and after that, it was very difficult to get our questions answered but they were more responsive as we got closer to our wedding. We are grateful for our wedding coordinators who were able to help get our questions answered. If you're an anxious bride like me, this wasn't the most ideal but overall we are very satisfied with the service we received. Highly recommend booking your events here but for weddings, get you a really good wedding planner/coordinator from their preferred vendor list (we recommend the Perfect Plan) to help save you the stress over the lack of communication !

I had my wedding at this venue in May 2025. The setting is truly beautiful. I picked it for its romantic atmosphere, and in that regard, it lived up to expectations. We absolutely loved the venue! It’s truly a hidden gem in South Sacramento, and our guests kept praising it. We really appreciated that the venue held Open Houses featuring their preferred vendors; we attended almost all of them before our wedding and saw vendors in action, which helped us choose amazing people to make our day special. The wine was excellent, and the staff were very friendly.  We’re very grateful to our wedding coordinators for answering our questions. We highly recommend booking events here, and for weddings, definitely hire a great photographer CineCrown photography video from their preferred vendor list (we loved CineCrown) to help capture our event!

I absolutely love Wolfe Heights! As a professional wedding photographer, I have the incredible opportunity to travel and shoot at breathtaking locations all across the country. After shooting here, I feel the venue as stunning and picturesque as Wolfe Heights is something truly special and quite rare. If you haven’t had the chance to explore or check out this amazing property yet, I highly recommend that you reach out to them and book a personal tour as soon as possible. The moment you set foot on the grounds, with the serene pond reflecting the sky, the graceful Willow trees swaying gently in the breeze, the lush vineyards stretching out beautifully, and the gorgeous estate building standing proudly, you will undoubtedly fall completely in love with this place! It’s not just a venue; it’s a magical setting that creates unforgettable memories for weddings and special events alike.

reviews.text:
We toured Bhachu Vineyards for our friend's October 2025 wedding and were absolutely blown away by this spectacular property. The owner, Barbara, took us on a personal tour of every space, sharing the story of how she and her husband have transformed this venue over three decades. You can feel the love and passion they've poured into every detail.

The property is immaculate and thoughtfully designed for events. Each space has its own distinct character - from the ceremony area surrounded by towering trees to the open-air reception space with market lighting overhead. The views across the valley and of Mt. Diablo are breathtaking, and there are multiple spots across the vineyard that would make for incredible photos.

What really sets this venue apart is Barbara's genuine care and attention. She's clearly invested in making each event special, and the fact that they only take on a limited number of weddings each year means every couple gets that personal touch. You can tell this isn't just a business to them - it's their home, their passion project, and their legacy.

The ongoing improvements and renovations show their commitment to excellence. As wedding planners based in San Diego, we've seen our share of venues & private estates, and we honestly wish we could pick this one up and bring it south with us! If you're looking for a unique venue where the owners truly care about your celebration and have created something genuinely magical, Bhachu Vineyards should be at the top of your list!

-Jacob & Alex, Thater Made Planning & Design

reviews.text:
PLEASE DO NOT consider Deerfield Ranch Winery for your wedding!!!!

I was a recent bride who held my wedding at Deerfield and despite plenty of planning and my easygoing nature, by the end of our experience I was massively pissed off and disappointed by the venue. They are lousy communicators, even going so far as to downright lie, and are hugely underprepared to host such important life events as weddings.

I have so many issues I could discuss and receipts to back them up but let me give just a few examples:

— despite having in writing (via email, 8 months in advance) that the wine would be complimentary “so please do not worry about a beverage requirement!” later the GM refused to fulfill the agreement and offered us a magnum bottle of wine guests would sign during the reception instead (which was nowhere to be found on our big day)

— despite having in writing (via our signed contact, 8 months in advance) that our ceremony start time would be 4:30pm the GM later indicated it would be an extra $1,000 for a 4:30pm start time. It took several emails and one long phone call for 4:30pm to be re-agreed upon (remember this, this issue comes back up again later)

— despite agreeing verbally (via a phone call, 2 months in advance, and reiterated via email) that our setup team could come as early as they like (plan was 12pm) our crew was met with rudeness on arrival and was told our ceremony start time was agreed as 5:30pm (a blatant lie) and that setup couldn’t start yet (causing a ripple effect of delays for the rest of the day)

Again, I could go on but you get the point.

Every step of planning was met with resistance and felt like pulling teeth to get even simple responses. The day of riddled with utterly avoidable stress & chaos. Overall, our whole experience was incredibly unprofessional and it truly tarnished our wedding day and that can never be mended.

This venue may look beautiful, but the people running it are disorganized, untrustworthy, and downright unpleasant to work with. I strongly advise anyone considering Deerfield Ranch Winery to look elsewhere--you deserve better on your special day.

reviews.text:
It was my first time photographing a wedding at Valensin Vineyard and Winery, and it left me with quite the impression; This place is a total gem, all brought to you by the color turquoise.

The centerpiece of this outdoor wedding venue is the long stretch of private lake that runs along its acreage. The grassy area along the lake makes for a scenic place to stage a ceremony. A large tent offers a shaded space to host a reception and dancing for small to medium-sized weddings all within sight of the water. As the sun sinks, the lakeshores offer a gorgeous place to take in the sunset--or even let your guests kick back in Adirondack chairs. (All of this was a godsend on the scorching summer day I was there.)

And because this venue is technically a vineyard, you can easily wander off into the grapevines as well. It's a great place for newlywed portraits!

Valensin Vineyard and Winery surpassed my expectations, and I'm eager for the next wedding I'll get to shoot here!
